LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK IS ENTITLED TO JUDGMENT IN ITS FAVOR AND AGAINST DEFENDANT JOEL O BAILEY IN THE AMOUNT OF $15,322.31 PLUS COSTS PER A MEMORANDUM OF COSTS PROCEDURE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR COSTS IS OPPOSED AND IT IS PREMATURE TO AWARD COSTS. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER AND TO COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: PAULA SHI, CSR # 13358 =302/HK

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-07-2017 Continued To Oct-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. H. FREDERICK M. SEIGENFELD OF MICHEAL & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 1-805-379-8505 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
JOEL O. BAILEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-722-0806, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank's motion for judgment on the pleadings is granted. American Express Centurion Bank is entitled to judgment in its favor and against defendant Joel O Bailey in the amount of $15,322.31 plus costs per a memorandum of costs procedure. Plaintiff's request for costs is opposed and it is premature to award costs. Mr. O Bailey's opposition acknowledges that he owes the principal amount sought, but requests that plaintiff take into account his financial circumstances. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order and to comply with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Paula Shi, CSR # 13358 =302/hk

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Continued To May-18-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - JOEL O. BAILEY, TEL. NO. 1-415-722-0816, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK's, Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is continued to May 18, 2017 in order to give the plaintiff an opportunity to file a Reply since Defendant has filed an Opposition. The court to give notice to the Plaintiff. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
